basic_details.job_title: CSIR CMERI CoEFM Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Assistant III, Project Associate I and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR-CMERI Centre of Excellence for Farm Machinery (CoEFM), Ludhiana
basic_details.post_name: Project JRF, Project Associate-II, Project Associate-I, Project Assistant Level-II
basic_details.total_vacancies: Multiple (Post Code wise: P-601 to P-605)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-CMERI CoEFM Ludhiana is recruiting Project Associate-II, Project Associate-I & Project JRF positions. Walk-in Interview Date: 10 July 2026.

important_dates.venue: CSIR-CMERI CoEFM, Opp. GNE College, Gill Road, Ludhiana-141006, Punjab

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: JRF: 28 years Project Associate: 35 years (relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Women as per GoI/CSIR rules)
qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech / M.Tech in Mechanical / Agricultural / Mechatronics Engineering (as per post code). For JRF: GATE/NET qualified preferred.

vacancy_details.details: Post Code P-601 to P-605 (Multiple posts under various projects): Project JRF / Project Associate-II / Project Associate-I in Mechanical / Agricultural / Mechatronics Engineering. Project Assistant Level-II. Tenure: Up to 31/03/2027 (extendable, co-terminus with project).

salary_details.details: Project JRF: Rs. 37,000 + HRA Project Associate-II: Rs. 35,000 / Rs. 28,000 + HRA (depending on GATE/NET qualification) Project Associate-I: Rs. 31,000 / Rs. 25,000 + HRA Project Assistant Level-II: Rs. 20,000 (fixed) | HRA as per DST norms. Hostel accommodation may be provided wherever available.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026. Candidates must bring all original documents
and recent passport size photograph. Selection is based on interview performance.
how_to_apply: Candidates must appear in person for the walk-in interview on 10 July 2026 between 09:00 AM to 10:30 AM at the venue mentioned above.
Filled Application Form (available on institute website)
important_instructions: Appointment is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates will not have any claim for regular appointment. The number of vacancies may vary on the date of interview. Decision of CSIR-CMERI will be final and binding. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI CoEFM Walk-in Interview Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date: CSIR-CMERI CoEFM, Opp. GNE College, Gill Road, Ludhiana-141006, Punjab

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI CoEFM Walk-in Interview Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Post Code P-601 to P-605 (Multiple posts under various projects): Project JRF / Project Associate-II / Project Associate-I in Mechanical / Agricultural / Mechatronics Engineering. Project Assistant Level-II. Tenure: Up to 31/03/2027 (extendable, co-terminus with project).

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI CoEFM Walk-in Interview Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: B.E./B.Tech / M.Tech in Mechanical / Agricultural / Mechatronics Engineering (as per post code). For JRF: GATE/NET qualified preferred.
Knowledge of CAD software, mechanical fabrication techniques, design & development of agricultural machinery.
JRF: 28 years Project Associate: 35 years (relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Women as per GoI/CSIR rules)

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI CoEFM Walk-in Interview Recruitment 2026 Remuneration Details
content_sections.text: Project JRF: Rs. 37,000 + HRA Project Associate-II: Rs. 35,000 / Rs. 28,000 + HRA (depending on GATE/NET qualification) Project Associate-I: Rs. 31,000 / Rs. 25,000 + HRA Project Assistant Level-II: Rs. 20,000 (fixed) HRA as per DST norms. Hostel accommodation may be provided wherever available.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI CoEFM Walk-in Interview Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview on 10 July 2026. Candidates must bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies, filled application form, and recent passport size photograph. Selection is based on interview performance.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CSIR CMERI CoEFM Walk-in Interview Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must appear in person for the walk-in interview on 10 July 2026 between 09:00 AM to 10:30 AM at the venue mentioned above. Documents Required: Filled Application Form (available on institute website) All original certificates & mark sheets Self-attested photocopies of documents Recent passport size photograph Experience certificates (if any) NOC from current employer (if applicable) No TA/DA will be paid.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for CSIR CMERI CoEFM Walk-in Interview Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Appointment is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates will not have any claim for regular appointment. The number of vacancies may vary on the date of interview. Decision of CSIR-CMERI will be final and binding. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for CSIR-CMERI Ludhiana 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project JRF at CSIR-CMERI CoEFM Ludhiana?
faq.answer: Project JRF will receive Rs. 37,000 + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are needed for Project Associate at CSIR-CMERI Ludhiana?
faq.answer: B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Agricultural / Mechatronics Engineering. GATE/NET qualified candidates get higher fellowship.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for CSIR-CMERI recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD and Women candidates as per GoI/CSIR rules.

faq.question: Q5. What documents are required for CSIR-CMERI Ludhiana walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Original documents, self-attested copies, filled application form, and passport size photo.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the venue for CSIR-CMERI CoEFM Ludhiana walk-in?
faq.answer: CSIR-CMERI Centre of Excellence for Farm Machinery, Opp. GNE College, Gill Road, Ludhiana-141006, Punjab.

faq.question: Q7. Can final year students apply for CSIR-CMERI Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess the required degree at the time of interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience mandatory for CSIR-CMERI JRF / Project Associate?
faq.answer: Desirable: Knowledge of CAD software and agricultural machinery design & fabrication.

faq.question: Q9. Will selected candidates get permanent job after project?
faq.answer: No. All positions are purely temporary and project-based.

faq.question: Q10. How to prepare for CSIR-CMERI Ludhiana walk-in interview 2026?
faq.answer: Revise core subjects, prepare on agricultural machinery, carry all documents, and reach on time.
